meaning: n.简易曲棍球棒v.击球,攀爬
examples: This is a pile of shinny silver!
How a shinny smile! Glad to know you!
Less residue, shinny and clean solder spot.
Shinny is thought to be the oldest form of the name for the game.
"It's a big difference going from shinny hockey where it's kind of half-paced, a lot of passing, without the scrambles around the net to playing in a real game, " LaBarbera said.
